Demo · Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind

Plan the next three weeks of site work in one live view.

Sitestack replaces siloed spreadsheets with a multiplayer plan that connects engineers, planners, and field crews - from lookahead through daily diary.

Open the demo View lookahead

Delayed

One live plan, every team

The handoffs between planning, engineering, and the field cause most project drift. Sitestack closes the loop.

Lookahead planning

Three-week visual plan that stays in sync with master schedule. Engineers update, planners review, managers see the slip immediately.

Daily site diary

Capture crews, weather, plant, and progress against the plan - every shift, every site. Auto-rolls into reporting.

Multiplayer by default

Engineers, planners, subcontractors and PMs work on the same live plan. Comments, mentions, and conflict resolution built in.

Plant &amp; resource view

See utilisation, idle plant, and clashes across the portfolio. Move resources between projects with one drag.
